title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 5 - 2017: 20 Area Dimension page still

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day on April 5, 2017 in Boulder, noting he got little sleep but felt fine. He worked on a chart he calls 'Area Dimension' showing race distances as circles with panoramic views, and got a new idea to add buildings at cardinal points as scale references. He also spent time listening to Wikipedia articles about the history of Rome and Titus Livius, feeling immersed in the historical narrative.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Surprised he isn't tired after two nights of only 4-5 hours of sleep
Excited and motivated despite it taking longer than expected; likes the page
Believes you can tap into the same mindset as historical figures when deeply engaged with their stories
Thinks they have gotten really good with lots of detail

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He spent time working on movie circles and found it time-consuming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he can finish the chart tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had a new idea to include buildings at the edges of the area in his chart to show distances.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thought about historical people crossing rivers and the challenges they faced.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is super excited and motivated to continue working on his project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He built something around his idea and feels like he might break a world record.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to give himself the rest of the week to finish his project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He likes the current page he's working on, even though it's taking longer than expected.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He talked for about 4 minutes and 39 seconds.
